'''[[Chedaki]]'s blockade runner''' was one of many vessels in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. A small, fast craft, it was disabled in orbit of [[Shiva IV]]. Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] managed to evacuate the craft in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 53}}
